item.title: By: Akash Vedi
item.dc:creator: Akash Vedi
item.description: Happy Birthday my lil Bro ^_^ may God bless you =D>
item.content:encoded: Happy Birthday my lil Bro ^_^ may God bless you =D>

item.title: By: Atharva Lath
item.dc:creator: Atharva Lath
item.description: Happy Birthday Bro! You missed the fun but I still hope you enjoyed your day!
item.content:encoded: Happy Birthday Bro! You missed the fun but I still hope you enjoyed your day!

item.title: By: Vathul
item.dc:creator: Vathul
item.description:
I will be surprised if u win TCS....
Happy Birthday. :)
item.content:encoded:
I will be surprised if u win TCS….

Happy Birthday. 🙂

item.title: By: Puneet Sahalot
item.dc:creator: Puneet Sahalot
item.description: Happy birthday bro! It was nice meeting you. Sadly, we didn't get much time to talk :( All the best for your ongoing and future projects.. wishing you good luck... :)
item.content:encoded:
Happy birthday bro!
It was nice meeting you. Sadly, we didn’t get much time to talk 🙁
All the best for your ongoing and future projects..
wishing you good luck… 🙂

item.title: By: Shobhan
item.dc:creator: Shobhan
item.description:
<blockquote>happy birthday my dear friend i promise that i wont forget you till the end there will not be a galaxy tab 750 in the speed post that i will send
Today is your birthday and thats all i have to say May you always be smiling and gay well dont read this in dismay
By gay i meant happy but i wont gift you a nappy :P Is this poem goin' crappy?
If it is then it must choke enjoy your birthday with cakes and coke to wish you birthday i just woke
My friend just got 16 yrs old he has grown very mature and bold oops my bread has developed a mold</blockquote>
happy birthday once again bro! ;)
item.content:encoded:
happy birthday my dear friend
i promise that i wont forget you till the end
there will not be a galaxy tab 750 in the speed post that i will send

Today is your birthday and thats all i have to say
May you always be smiling and gay
well dont read this in dismay

By gay i meant happy
but i wont gift you a nappy 😛
Is this poem goin’ crappy?

If it is then it must choke
enjoy your birthday with cakes and coke
to wish you birthday i just woke

My friend just got 16 yrs old
he has grown very mature and bold
oops my bread has developed a mold

happy birthday once again bro! 😉
